case_title: MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. VITALI VICTOR MAKARKIN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MAKARKIN, VITALI VICTOR DESOTO CAB COMPANY DOES 1 TO 20,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-27-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-26-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-11-2004

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT; ALTERNATIVE DISPUTE RESOLUTION NOTICE AND INFORMATION PACKAGE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED NOV-25-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-07-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT, VITALI VICTOR MAKARKIN, AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE FEB-27-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-07-2004 CONTINUED TO MAY-12-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). APR-07-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-12-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
